---
title: "Summary"
author: "Dalton C. Leibold"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```
```{r sourcing}
pacman::p_load(here)
source(here("r", "source.R"))
```
```{r summary statistics}
tbl.1.a
tbl.1.b
```
```{r egg mortality, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 12}
fig.2.a.i
fig.2.a.ii
tbl.2.a.i
tbl.2.a.i
tbl.s.2.a.i
tbl.2.a.ii
tbl.s.2.a.ii
```
```{r hatchling mass, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 12}
fig.2.b.i
fig.2.b.ii
tbl.2.b.i
tbl.s.2.b.i
tbl.2.b.ii
tbl.s.2.b.ii
```
```{r hatchling svl, fig.height = 6, fig.width = 12}
fig.2.c.i
fig.2.c.ii
tbl.2.c.i
tbl.s.2.c.i
tbl.2.c.ii
tbl.s.2.c.ii
```
